DisplayName.value: Tier 1 Melee Weapons As Intro Buried Supplies Rewards

Description.value: Tier 1 Melee Weapons As Intro Buried Supplies Rewards changes the rewards for completing the Intro Buried Supplies quest. Instead of Tier 0 pipe weapons and ammo, you choose a Tier 1 melee weapon (Baseball Bat, Hunting Knife, Iron Knuckles, Iron Spear, Iron Sledgehammer).
